name: miamono-desktop
description: Aplicativo desktop open source para registro, consulta e exportação de recebimentos, pensado para profissionais liberais que precisam manter controle financeiro organizado e histórico confiável.

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/main', { recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/preload', { recursive: true })" && esbuild src/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/main/main.js --external:electron --external:sqlite && esbuild src/preload/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/preload/preload.js --external:electron && esbuild src/renderer/main.ts --format=esm --outfile=dist/renderer/main.js && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/renderer/index.html', 'dist/renderer/index.html')" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/renderer/styles.css', 'dist/renderer/styles.css')" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('doc/miamono-mascote.png', 'dist/renderer/miamono-mascote.png')"
scripts.package:dir: npm run build && npm run icon:generate && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run icon:generate && npm run package:win:dir && npm run package:win:patch-icon && npm run package:win:installer
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz
scripts.package:all: npm run build && npm run icon:generate && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis --linux AppImage tar.gz
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run seed
